lessons.title: Prime Factorization
lessons.objective: I can write a number as a product of its prime factors using a factor tree.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain how I broke a number down using the words prime number, composite number, factor, and exponent.

lessons.title: Prime Factorization
lessons.objective: I can write a number as a product of its prime factors using a factor tree.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain how I broke a number down using the words prime number, composite number, factor, and exponent.

lessons.title: Greatest Common Factor
lessons.objective: I can find the greatest common factor (GCF) of two numbers by listing or comparing their factors.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain how I found the GCF using the words factor, common factor, divisible, and greatest common factor.

lessons.title: Least Common Multiple
lessons.objective: I can find the least common multiple (LCM) of two numbers by listing or comparing their multiples.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain how I found the LCM using the words multiple, common multiple, skip counting, and least common multiple.

lessons.title: Divide Multi-Digit Numbers
lessons.objective: I can divide multi-digit whole numbers and explain the meaning of the quotient and remainder.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my division using the words dividend, divisor, quotient, and remainder.

lessons.title: Add and Subtract Decimals
lessons.objective: I can add and subtract decimals by lining up the place values and the decimal points.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words decimal, place value, tenths, hundredths, and annex zeros.

lessons.title: Multiply Decimals
lessons.objective: I can multiply decimals and place the decimal point correctly in the product.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words product, decimal point, estimate, and decimal places.

lessons.title: Divide Decimals
lessons.objective: I can divide with decimals by making the divisor a whole number first.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words dividend, divisor, quotient, and equivalent division.

lessons.title: Interpret Division of Fractions
lessons.objective: I can use models to interpret what it means to divide by a fraction.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain a fraction division using the words dividend, divisor, quotient, reciprocal, and unit fraction.

lessons.title: Interpret Division of Fractions
lessons.objective: I can use models to interpret what it means to divide by a fraction.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain a fraction division using the words dividend, divisor, quotient, reciprocal, and unit fraction.

lessons.title: Divide Whole Numbers by Fractions
lessons.objective: I can divide a whole number by a fraction by multiplying by the reciprocal.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words fraction, reciprocal, quotient, and Keep, Change, Flip.

lessons.title: Divide Fractions
lessons.objective: I can divide a fraction by a fraction by multiplying by the reciprocal and simplifying.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words dividend, divisor, reciprocal, quotient, and simplify.

lessons.title: Divide Mixed Numbers
lessons.objective: I can divide mixed numbers by first changing them to improper fractions.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words mixed number, improper fraction, convert, reciprocal, and simplify.

lessons.title: Fraction Division Problem Solving
lessons.objective: I can solve real-world problems by writing and solving fraction division equations.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words model, equation, solution, and reasonableness.

lessons.title: Understand Ratios
lessons.objective: I can write and describe a ratio that compares two quantities.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain a comparison using the words ratio, part-to-part, part-to-whole, and colon notation.

lessons.title: Understand Ratios
lessons.objective: I can write and describe a ratio that compares two quantities.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain a comparison using the words ratio, part-to-part, part-to-whole, and colon notation.

lessons.title: Ratio Tables
lessons.objective: I can use a ratio table to find equivalent ratios.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my table using the words ratio table, equivalent ratio, scale factor, and pattern.

lessons.title: Graph Ratio Tables
lessons.objective: I can graph the values from a ratio table as points on the coordinate plane.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my graph using the words coordinate plane, ordered pair, origin, and proportional.

lessons.title: Equivalent Ratios
lessons.objective: I can find and check equivalent ratios using multiplication and division.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words equivalent ratios, rate, proportion, and simplify.

lessons.title: Compare Ratios
lessons.objective: I can compare ratios by finding unit rates or using equivalent ratios.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my comparison using the words unit rate, equivalent ratio, compare, and common denominator.

lessons.title: Use Ratio Reasoning
lessons.objective: I can use ratio reasoning to solve problems with proportions and scaling.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words proportion, scale, equivalent, and unit rate.

lessons.title: Ratio and Rate Problem Solving
lessons.objective: I can solve real-world rate problems by finding and using unit rates.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my solution using the words rate, unit rate, per, and proportion.

lessons.title: Rates and Unit Rates
lessons.objective: I can find a unit rate to compare prices and decide the better buy.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my choice using the words rate, unit rate, per, and better buy.

lessons.title: Rates and Unit Rates
lessons.objective: I can find a unit rate to compare prices and decide the better buy.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my choice using the words rate, unit rate, per, and better buy.

lessons.title: Relate Fractions, Decimals, and Percents
lessons.objective: I can write equivalent fractions, decimals, and percents for the same value.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my conversions using the words percent, decimal, equivalent, and benchmark.

lessons.title: Percents Greater Than 100% and Less Than 1%
lessons.objective: I can write and interpret percents greater than 100% and less than 1%.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words percent, greater than 100%, less than 1%, and equivalent.

lessons.title: Find the Percent of a Number
lessons.objective: I can find the percent of a number using an equation or a model.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words percent, base, part, and equation.

lessons.title: Use Percent to Solve Problems
lessons.objective: I can solve problems involving discounts, markups, tax, and tips using percents.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my solution using the words discount, markup, tax, tip, and percent.

lessons.title: Convert Measurement Units
lessons.objective: I can convert measurement units using ratios and conversion factors.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my conversion using the words conversion factor, unit, equivalent, and ratio.

lessons.title: Solve Problems with Unit Rates
lessons.objective: I can solve real-world problems by using unit rates to compare options.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my comparison using the words unit rate, better buy, per unit, and rate.

lessons.title: Area of Parallelograms
lessons.objective: I can find the area of a parallelogram using base × height.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain how I found the area using the words base, height, area, and formula.

lessons.title: Area of Trapezoids
lessons.objective: I can find the area of a trapezoid using the formula A = ½(b1 + b2) × h.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words trapezoid, base, height, and area.

lessons.title: Area of Triangles
lessons.objective: I can find the area of a triangle using the formula A = ½ × base × height.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words base, height, area, and perpendicular.

lessons.title: Area of Triangles
lessons.objective: I can find the area of a triangle using the formula A = ½ × base × height.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words base, height, area, and perpendicular.

lessons.title: Area of Regular Polygons
lessons.objective: I can find the area of a regular polygon by decomposing it into triangles.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words regular polygon, decompose, triangle, and composite.

lessons.title: Area of Composite Figures
lessons.objective: I can find the area of a composite figure by adding or subtracting the areas of basic shapes.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words composite figure, decompose, add, and subtract.

lessons.title: Powers and Exponents
lessons.objective: I can write and evaluate numbers in exponent form using a base and a power.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words exponent, base, power, and evaluate.

lessons.title: Powers and Exponents
lessons.objective: I can write and evaluate numbers in exponent form using a base and a power.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words exponent, base, power, and evaluate.

lessons.title: Evaluate Expressions
lessons.objective: I can evaluate algebraic expressions by substituting values for the variables.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words variable, expression, evaluate, and substitute.

lessons.title: Write Algebraic Expressions
lessons.objective: I can write algebraic expressions from words and real-world situations.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my expression using the words variable, coefficient, constant, and algebraic expression.

lessons.title: Properties of Operations
lessons.objective: I can use the commutative, associative, and identity properties to rewrite expressions.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words commutative property, associative property, and identity property.

lessons.title: The Distributive Property
lessons.objective: I can use the distributive property to expand and factor expressions.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words distributive property, factor, expand, and equivalent.

lessons.title: Equivalent Expressions
lessons.objective: I can show that two expressions are equivalent by simplifying and combining like terms.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words equivalent, simplify, like terms, and combine.

lessons.title: Simplify Algebraic Expressions
lessons.objective: I can simplify algebraic expressions by combining like terms.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words like terms, combine, simplify, and coefficient.

lessons.title: Write Equations
lessons.objective: I can write an equation to represent a real-world situation.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my equation using the words equation, variable, equal sign, and expression.

lessons.title: Write Equations
lessons.objective: I can write an equation to represent a real-world situation.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my equation using the words equation, variable, equal sign, and expression.

lessons.title: Solve One-Step Addition and Subtraction Equations
lessons.objective: I can solve one-step addition and subtraction equations using inverse operations.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words equation, inverse operation, isolate, and solution.

lessons.title: Solve Multiplication and Division Equations
lessons.objective: I can solve one-step multiplication and division equations using inverse operations.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my steps using the words inverse operation, multiply, divide, and isolate.

lessons.title: Write Inequalities
lessons.objective: I can write inequalities to represent real-world situations.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my inequality using the words inequality, greater than, less than, and at least / at most.

lessons.title: Graph Inequalities
lessons.objective: I can graph the solutions of an inequality on a number line.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my graph using the words number line, open circle, closed circle, and solution set.

lessons.title: Solve and Graph Inequalities
lessons.objective: I can solve an inequality and graph its solution set on a number line.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words solve, graph, solution, and substitute.

lessons.title: Equations and Inequalities Problem Solving
lessons.objective: I can model and solve real-world problems using equations and inequalities.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words model, equation, inequality, and reasonableness.

lessons.title: Statistical Questions and Data
lessons.objective: I can tell the difference between a statistical question and a non-statistical question.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words statistical question, data, variability, and survey.

lessons.title: Statistical Questions and Data
lessons.objective: I can tell the difference between a statistical question and a non-statistical question.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words statistical question, data, variability, and survey.

lessons.title: Mean, Median, and Mode
lessons.objective: I can find the mean, median, and mode of a data set.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words mean, median, mode, and outlier.

lessons.title: Mean Absolute Deviation
lessons.objective: I can find the mean absolute deviation (MAD) to describe how spread out data is.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words mean absolute deviation, deviation, absolute value, and spread.

lessons.title: Appropriate Measures
lessons.objective: I can choose the best measure of center for a data set based on its shape.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my choice using the words mean, median, outlier, and skewed.

lessons.title: Display Data: Box Plots
lessons.objective: I can make and read a box plot to summarize a data set.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my box plot using the words box plot, median, quartile, and interquartile range.

lessons.title: Display Data: Histograms
lessons.objective: I can make and read a histogram to display data in intervals.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my histogram using the words histogram, frequency, interval, and distribution.

lessons.title: Shape of Data Distributions
lessons.objective: I can describe the shape of a data distribution as symmetric, skewed, or having clusters and gaps.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my description using the words symmetric, skewed, cluster, and gap.

lessons.title: Graph on the Coordinate Plane
lessons.objective: I can plot and identify points on the coordinate plane using ordered pairs.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words coordinate plane, ordered pair, origin, and quadrant.

lessons.title: Graph on the Coordinate Plane
lessons.objective: I can plot and identify points on the coordinate plane using ordered pairs.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words coordinate plane, ordered pair, origin, and quadrant.

lessons.title: Integers and Absolute Value
lessons.objective: I can identify integers and find their absolute value.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words integer, positive, negative, absolute value, and opposite.

lessons.title: Compare and Order Integers
lessons.objective: I can compare and order integers using a number line.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words compare, order, greater than, and less than.

lessons.title: Rational Numbers on the Number Line
lessons.objective: I can place rational numbers, including fractions and decimals, on a number line.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my reasoning using the words rational number, fraction, decimal, and number line.

lessons.title: Ordered Pairs in All Four Quadrants
lessons.objective: I can plot ordered pairs in all four quadrants of the coordinate plane.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words quadrant, negative coordinate, reflection, and axis.

lessons.title: Distance on the Coordinate Plane
lessons.objective: I can find the distance between two points on the coordinate plane using absolute value.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words distance, absolute value, horizontal distance, and vertical distance.

lessons.title: Reflect Points Across Axes
lessons.objective: I can reflect points across the x-axis and y-axis on the coordinate plane.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words reflection, x-axis, y-axis, and symmetry.

lessons.title: Volume with Whole Number Edges
lessons.objective: I can find the volume of a rectangular prism with whole-number edges using length × width × height.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words volume, rectangular prism, cubic units, and edge.

lessons.title: Volume with Whole Number Edges
lessons.objective: I can find the volume of a rectangular prism with whole-number edges using length × width × height.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words volume, rectangular prism, cubic units, and edge.

lessons.title: Volume of Rectangular Prisms
lessons.objective: I can find the volume of a rectangular prism, including ones with fractional edge lengths, using base area × height.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words volume, rectangular prism, dimensions, and base area.

lessons.title: Surface Area Using Nets
lessons.objective: I can find the surface area of a solid by using its net.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words surface area, net, face, and two-dimensional.

lessons.title: Surface Area of Prisms
lessons.objective: I can find the surface area of rectangular and triangular prisms.
lessons.languageObjective: I can explain my work using the words surface area, rectangular prism, triangular prism, and face.

lessons.title: Surface Area of Pyramids
lessons.objective: I can find the surface area of a pyramid by adding the base area and the lateral faces.
